languages.text: "Я долгое время следовал заповедям обслуживания аугментики, питая свою плоть священными парентеральными составами. Тем не менее, воспринимать мирскую пищу мое тело вполне способно. Во славу Омниссии, да начнется сей эксперимент".

"I have long observed the precepts of augmetic maintenance, nourishing my flesh with sacred parenteral formulations. Nevertheless, my body is quite capable of accepting mundane provisions. To the glory of the Omnissiah, let the experiment commence."
languages.original_text: "Я долгое время следовал заповедям обслуживания аугментики, питая свою плоть священными парентеральными составами. Тем не менее, воспринимать мирскую пищу мое тело вполне способно. Во славу Омниссии, да начнется сей эксперимент".

traits.locale_text: "I have long observed the precepts of augmetic maintenance, nourishing my flesh with sacred parenteral formulations. Nevertheless, my body is quite capable of accepting mundane provisions. To the glory of the Omnissiah, let the experiment commence."

"I have long observed the precepts of augmetic maintenance, nourishing my flesh with sacred parenteral formulations. Nevertheless, my body is quite capable of accepting mundane provisions. To the glory of the Omnissiah, let the experiment commence."

"I have long observed the precepts of augmetic maintenance, nourishing my flesh with sacred parenteral formulations. Nevertheless, my body is quite capable of accepting mundane provisions. To the glory of the Omnissiah, let the experiment commence."

languages.text: «Hace mucho que sigo los preceptos del mantenimiento aumético, nutriendo mi carne con sagradas formulaciones parenterales. Aun así, mi organismo es perfectamente capaz de tolerar viandas ordinarias. ¡Que comience el experimento, por la gloria del Omnissiah!».
languages.original_text: "I have long observed the precepts of augmetic maintenance, nourishing my flesh with sacred parenteral formulations. Nevertheless, my body is quite capable of accepting mundane provisions. To the glory of the Omnissiah, let the experiment commence."

traits.locale_text: «Hace mucho que sigo los preceptos del mantenimiento aumético, nutriendo mi carne con sagradas formulaciones parenterales. Aun así, mi organismo es perfectamente capaz de tolerar viandas ordinarias. ¡Que comience el experimento, por la gloria del Omnissiah!».

languages.text: “长久以来，我一直恪守生体强化的维护准则，以神圣肠外制剂滋养我的血肉。不过，我的躯体倒也完全能摄取世俗食物。为了欧姆尼赛亚的荣耀，我们这就开始实验吧。”
languages.original_text: "I have long observed the precepts of augmetic maintenance, nourishing my flesh with sacred parenteral formulations. Nevertheless, my body is quite capable of accepting mundane provisions. To the glory of the Omnissiah, let the experiment commence."

traits.locale_text: “长久以来，我一直恪守生体强化的维护准则，以神圣肠外制剂滋养我的血肉。不过，我的躯体倒也完全能摄取世俗食物。为了欧姆尼赛亚的荣耀，我们这就开始实验吧。”

languages.text: « Je respecte depuis longtemps les préceptes de la maintenance des augmétiques et je nourris ma chair par des formules parentérales spécifiques. Cependant, mon corps reste capable de consommer des aliments ordinaires. Pour la gloire de l'Omnimessie, commençons l'expérience. »
languages.original_text: "I have long observed the precepts of augmetic maintenance, nourishing my flesh with sacred parenteral formulations. Nevertheless, my body is quite capable of accepting mundane provisions. To the glory of the Omnissiah, let the experiment commence."

traits.locale_text: « Je respecte depuis longtemps les préceptes de la maintenance des augmétiques et je nourris ma chair par des formules parentérales spécifiques. Cependant, mon corps reste capable de consommer des aliments ordinaires. Pour la gloire de l'Omnimessie, commençons l'expérience. »

languages.text: "Uzun zamandır etimi kutsal parenteral formüllerle besleyerek ogmetik bakım kurallarına uyuyorum. Yine de vücudum, sıradan erzakları kabul edebilecek kapasitede. Hermesih'in şanı için deney başlasın."
languages.original_text: "I have long observed the precepts of augmetic maintenance, nourishing my flesh with sacred parenteral formulations. Nevertheless, my body is quite capable of accepting mundane provisions. To the glory of the Omnissiah, let the experiment commence."

traits.locale_text: "Uzun zamandır etimi kutsal parenteral formüllerle besleyerek ogmetik bakım kurallarına uyuyorum. Yine de vücudum, sıradan erzakları kabul edebilecek kapasitede. Hermesih'in şanı için deney başlasın."

languages.text: 「私は長きにわたりオーグメティック維持の戒律を遵守し、神聖なる非経口栄養剤で己が肉体を養ってきました。とはいえ、私の身体は俗世の食料を受け入れることも十分に可能です。オムニッシアの栄光のために、実験を始めましょう」
languages.original_text: "I have long observed the precepts of augmetic maintenance, nourishing my flesh with sacred parenteral formulations. Nevertheless, my body is quite capable of accepting mundane provisions. To the glory of the Omnissiah, let the experiment commence."

traits.locale_text: 「私は長きにわたりオーグメティック維持の戒律を遵守し、神聖なる非経口栄養剤で己が肉体を養ってきました。とはいえ、私の身体は俗世の食料を受け入れることも十分に可能です。オムニッシアの栄光のために、実験を始めましょう」

languages.text: "Ich habe die Empfindungen der augmetischen Wartung lange beobachtet und mein Fleisch mit heiliger parenteraler Nahrung versorgt. Dennoch ist mein Körper durchaus in der Lage, auch weltliche Nahrung zu verarbeiten. Für den Ruhm des Omnissiah, möge das Experiment beginnen."
languages.original_text: "I have long observed the precepts of augmetic maintenance, nourishing my flesh with sacred parenteral formulations. Nevertheless, my body is quite capable of accepting mundane provisions. To the glory of the Omnissiah, let the experiment commence."
